issues.detail: The instructions do not cover all possible error scenarios and edge cases.
The skill is Node.js specific and may not work with agents on other platforms.

scenarios.name: static-pagination-csv-export
scenarios.rationale: Response A fails to use CheerioCrawler and the required methods, while Response B meets all functional requirements except for the exact CSV filename, earning it partial credit.

scenarios.name: js-rendered-infinite-scroll-proxy
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but omits the required page.locator click; Response B fails to meet the PlaywrightCrawler, ProxyConfiguration, and extraction method requirements.
